# StencilMaker

> StencilMaker is the AI tool engineered specifically for professional
> tattoo artists. It converts client reference photos into vector-grade
> tattoo stencils — clean linework optimized for thermal-transfer paper —
> eliminating roughly an hour of iPad tracing per client.

## What StencilMaker does

- Generates tattoo stencils from any reference image (photo, sketch, or AI art).
- Strips background, lighting artifacts, and noise; outputs pure linework.
- Supports 12 AI style engines: Standard, Traditional, Fine Line, Minimalist, Geometric, Tribal, Japanese, Blackwork, Neo-Traditional, Dotwork, Realism, and Realism Animals.
- Exports PNG (Free), plus PNG + PDF + SVG (Premium).
- Prints directly to thermal transfer printers over AirPrint (WiFi) — no pairing or proprietary hardware required.

## Who it is for

Professional tattoo artists, apprentices, and studios. Independent artists working from iPhone, Android, or desktop browsers.

## Platforms

Live now on iOS (App Store) and Android (Google Play), plus a web app for desktop workflows. One account syncs across all three.

## Pricing (USD)

- Free — $0. 1 stencil per day, 10 free stencils to start, 4 core styles (Standard, Traditional, Fine Line, Minimalist), PNG export.
- Premium — $7.99/month or $59.99/year (save 37%, 7-day free trial on the annual plan). All 12 style engines, PNG/PDF/SVG export, cloud gallery, offline access to cached stencils, and up to 10 stencils/day (5/day on monthly, 10/day on annual).
- Pay-as-you-go credit packs (never expire): Starter $4.99/550 credits, Popular $9.99/1,100 credits, Pro $24.99/3,000 credits. 20 credits = 1 stencil.

## Key differentiators

- AI model trained specifically on stencil-grade linework — not a generic photo-to-line filter.
- Output quality holds up under thermal transfer (heat-resistant, no broken contours).
- Vector-grade output (SVG) preserves precision at any scale.
- Built by and for working tattoo artists, not hobbyists.
